testcase.name: test_image_chat_with_auth_token
testcase.failure: tests/test_auth.py:372: in test_image_chat_with_auth_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Invalid file data: 'messages[2].content[0].file.file_data'. Expected a base64-encoded data URL with an application/pdf MIME type (e.g. 'data:application/pdf;base64,SGVsbG8sIFdvcmxkIQ=='), but got unsupported MIME type 'image/png'.. Received Model Group=gpt-4o\nAvailable Model Group Fallbacks=None"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
